TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Yanping Nsgan Yanping o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 480.64 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 419.42 km², dxgal pmblxan o 48.33 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 3,828, sapah o 1,131, seejiq tnpusu 3,523 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 92%(Bunung). Bunung ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Yanping o niqan 5 alang ni maxal 11. 11 o, Kainisungan , Kamisatu , Kaminu , Nakanu , Su nun sung , Buklavu , Kalisahan , Minami , Vakangan , Pasikau , Talunas . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: janpiŋ nsgan janpiŋ o gaga nsgan taituŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(bunuŋ). bunuŋ ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan janpiŋ o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, kainisuŋan , kamisatu , kaminu , nakanu , su nun suŋ , bukla*u , kalisaħan , minami , *akaŋan , pasikau , talunas . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Yanping Nsgan Yanping o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 480.64 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 419.42 km², dxgal pmblxan o 48.33 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 3,828, sapah o 1,131, seejiq tnpusu 3,523 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 92%(Bunung). Bunung ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Yanping o niqan 5 alang ni maxal 11. 11 o, Kainisungan , Kamisatu , Kaminu , Nakanu , Su nun sung , Buklavu , Kalisahan , Minami , Vakangan , Pasikau , Talunas . pusupnyahan patas
